mechanical_checks.char_limit_rule: Jamie target <=250; hard cap 300 (>250 FIX, >300 BLOCK)
mechanical_checks.self_check_note: gate_selfcheck.char_count_note is WRONG on every row (understates SS&C by 35, Lyra by 15). Do not trust it.

per_role.recipient_currency_note: 2nd-degree, explicit 'Apr 2024 - Present', mutual connection cited. Solid.
per_role.notes: Email NextGen C-suite L&D claim supported by content_library (2,000+ responses to C-suite; L&D project).

per_role.recipient_currency_note: 2nd-degree, 'starting new position' post ~11mo ago + active profile + mutual connection. Solid.
per_role.notes: 'feedback systems' + '78% adoption' + NextGen support all trace to content_library.

per_role.recipient_currency_note: 2nd-degree, detailed current Nielsen experience block + mutual connection. Solid.
per_role.notes: 'supported M&A integration work at Vestas' is SUPPORTED and actually UNDERSTATED vs content_library ('directing a Merger & Acquisition project, migrating and merging employee records'). 'stakeholder engagement frameworks / feedback systems that informed C-suite priorities' traces to NextGen + 'built a feedback system from scratch'. OK.

per_role.recipient_currency_note: 2nd-degree, 'HR Manager @ Trend', recent re-share 3wk ago, no end date. Solid.
per_role.notes: 'Top Workplace designation' is a claim ABOUT TREND, not about Jamie - acceptable if true of the company; not a Jamie-fabrication. '78% adoption across distributed workforce' traces to content_library.

per_role.note_fix_required: Trim LinkedIn note from 280 to <=250 chars (30+ chars over). Self-check claimed 245 - WRONG by 35.
per_role.recipient_currency_note: 3rd-degree (NOT directly visible to Jamie); evidence cites explicit 'Sep 2025 - Present (10 mos)'. Currency asserted by drafter from profile read - plausible and dated, but cannot be re-verified in this audit. Treat as asserted-not-independently-confirmed.
per_role.notes: Only issue is the over-length note. Email body is clean - 78% enrollment + LMS + adult-learning all trace to content_library.

per_role.recipient_currency_note: 2nd-degree, recruiting post 2mo ago, PSU alum (Portland-local). Solid warm contact.
per_role.notes: Recipient is a recruiter (TA) - on the People team and the natural first contact for a submitted app, so on-lane is fine; note he is TA not the HRBP. Claims trace to content_library.

per_role.note_fix_required: Trim LinkedIn note from 258 to <=250 chars (8 over). Self-check claimed 243 - WRONG by 15.
per_role.recipient_currency_note: 3rd-degree; evidence is ONLY 'headline + institution = Lyra Health, no end date' - no dates, no recent activity cited. Thinnest currency evidence in the batch. Asserted, not independently confirmed - verify on live LinkedIn before sending.
per_role.notes: Over-length note + thin recipient-currency evidence. Email body clean (78% + facilitation + NextGen C-suite L&D trace to content_library).

fabrication_flags: EMAIL: 'experience supporting HR administrative operations, HRIS accuracy' - content_library lists HRIS only as a USER-LEVEL TOOL skill (SAP/Rippling/ADP), NOT as an accomplishment. No bullet supports 'HRIS accuracy' work. profile_compact lists HRIS admin/data-entry under AVOID and as a basic (one-star) skill. Overstates a tool into experience AND pitches her into the clerical lane she avoids. REMOVE.

EMAIL: 'I've coordinated new hire orientation programs' - NO bullet in content_library supports new-hire-orientation. Closest is Vestas 'optimized onboarding processes via process analysis' (process work, not running orientations). Invented to match the HR Coordinator JD. REMOVE or replace with the true onboarding-process bullet.

EMAIL (minor): 'built internal communications content' - only traceable via the consulting-variant Vestas line ('internal communications and award-winning HR initiatives') / Kronos. Weak but borderline-OK; keep only if reworded to her real comms work, not generic.
per_role.recipient_currency_note: 3rd-degree; recruiting post 2wk ago for Oberto/Hempler's roles - reasonable currency signal. Asserted but plausible.
per_role.notes: Worst of the batch on RULE 0. The email leans on JD-keyword matching (HRIS accuracy / new-hire orientation) rather than Jamie's real record. Rewrite the credentials paragraph to her TRUE coordinator-adjacent experience (program coordination, onboarding-process analysis, feedback systems, recognition) and drop HRIS-accuracy + new-hire-orientation.

fabrications: Oberto email: 'coordinated new hire orientation programs' (not in content_library)
thin_recipients: Lyra/Lauren Sheline (3rd-degree, no dates/activity in evidence - verify live before send)
summary.char_count_field_systematically_wrong: gate_selfcheck.char_count_note understated true length on every row - do not trust it; recount before send.
what_must_change_before_send: 3. Rewrite Oberto email credentials paragraph: remove 'HRIS accuracy' and 'coordinated new hire orientation programs'; ground in her real program-coordination / onboarding-process-analysis / feedback-system / recognition experience.
4. Re-verify Lyra/Lauren currency on live LinkedIn (thin evidence) before any send.
5. Fix the char_count_note self-check field on all rows so it stops lying.
summary.what_is_clean: 5 of 8 (Talkiatry, PT Solutions, Nielsen, Trend, Family Resource) PASS as-is. No banned numbers, no fellow-X claims, no false current-role claims, no InGenius reference anywhere. The Vestas M&A and NextGen C-suite-L&D claims are all properly grounded.
